repo.notes: Report says repo root, research files, scripts, examples, benchmark manifest, and tracker were inspected.

pages.notes: Report says Pages reflected the v0.5 lifecycle and benchmark-trace framing.

schemas.notes: Report says dispatcher plus Micro, Map, and Audit profiles were inspected.

scripts.notes: Report says public scripts and test harness behavior were reviewed.

examples.notes: Report says the scientific mechanism example was reviewed in detail.

benchmark_scaffold.notes: Report says benchmark minimums and five current cases were reviewed.

attached_context.notes: Report says the uploaded combined prompt/context brief matched the public prompt and context files.

direct_observations: The report states that the public repo, Pages, schema profiles, scripts, examples, benchmark scaffold, and attached context were inspected.
The report found no public release-blocking mismatch requiring another large architecture cycle before benchmarking.
self_reported_claims: The submitted context said npm run schema:check, npm run validate, npm run benchmark, and npm test passed locally before Run 03.
inferences: The report infers that context load and anchoring risk increase when stable protocol and volatile status are bundled together.
The report infers that the next major OfOne step should be empirical benchmark execution after protocol hardening.
open_gaps: Run 03 did not independently rerun local commands; local verification remains required after implementation.

ranked_backlog.recommendation: Add a typed convergence gate so the recursive review loop can switch from architecture iteration to benchmark work instead of relying on prose.
Add allowlisted-source, no-follow, no-execute, and no-write review rules to convert source-boundary policy into operational review safety.
Require a structured review sidecar with inspected surfaces, backlog, stale items, convergence gate, and benchmark handoff state.
Split stable recursive review protocol from volatile per-run context and explicitly label self-reported claims separately from independently observed repo facts.
acceptance_tests: Manual check that the next prompt points to the stable protocol and labels local command results as self-reported until rerun locally.

stale_or_deferred.reason: Run 03 found no release-blocking architecture mismatch and recommended benchmark execution rather than more core schema growth.
The benchmark scaffold is not yet evidence of superiority; result publication and failure analysis remain future work.

convergence_gate.stop_reason: One more protocol-hardening pass is accepted; after that, architecture iteration should hand off to benchmark execution unless a new release blocker appears.

benchmark_handoff.reason: Run 03 recommends one protocol hardening pass, then shifting serious iteration to empirical benchmark execution rather than more schema expansion.
minimum_next_evidence: Validated review sidecar schema and checker
Updated protocol prompt with convergence gate and safety rules
Local schema, validate, benchmark, review, and test commands passing
